DIY & Skills

Decentralized CommunicationFood SovereigntyHardware & RepairStreet Med

Decentralized Communication

tool

Briar (Decentralized Messenger)

Encrypted, peer-to-peer messaging that works without internet via Bluetooth or WiFi — built for activists.

communicationencrypteddecentralizedoffline
tool

Meshtastic

Open-source, off-grid mesh radio network for community communication without internet infrastructure.

mesh-networkradioofflinedecentralized
archive

Zine Library (Barnard)

Searchable digital archive of thousands of zines on politics, health, community organizing, and DIY culture.

zinesdiyarchivepolitics
archive

Internet Archive

Free digital library of books, films, music, and software. Includes out-of-print homesteading manuals and technical how-tos.

archivebookszinespreservation

Food Sovereignty

archive

Appropedia

Sustainability wiki with thousands of articles on permaculture, urban farming, water systems, and appropriate technology.

permaculturetechnologysustainabilitywiki
guide

Homesteaders of America

Guides on small-scale farming, food preservation, animal husbandry, and land stewardship.

farmingfood-preservationanimals
guide

Seed Savers Exchange

Guides on seed saving, seed storage, and preserving heirloom varieties. Includes a seed library network.

seedsfarmingfood-sovereignty
guide

Urban Farming Guys

Practical video and written guides on urban farming, aquaponics, and food production in small spaces.

urban-farmingaquaponicsfood

Hardware & Repair

guide

iFixit

Free repair guides for electronics, appliances, and more. Central resource for the Right to Repair movement.

repairelectronicsright-to-repair
tool

Repair Café International

Find a local repair café or start one — community spaces where volunteers help fix electronics, clothing, and furniture.

repaircommunityelectronics
guide

Practical Action Technical Briefs

Free technical guides on sustainable building, water and sanitation, food processing, and energy.

buildingwaterenergyfood
tool

Right to Repair Coalition

Advocacy, legislation tracker, and resources for the Right to Repair movement.

right-to-repairpolicyadvocacy

Street Med

book

Riot Medicine

Free book on street medic skills for demonstrations — triage, trauma, crowd medicine, and harm reduction.

medicfirst-aiddemonstrations
archive

Street Medic Wiki

Community-maintained wiki for street medics covering supplies, protocols, and training resources.

medicfirst-aidprotest
tool

NEXT Distro: Harm Reduction

Platform connecting people to harm reduction resources, supplies, and services across the country.

harm-reductionhealthcommunity
